title: Calendar trigger not detecting new data
symptom: The calendar trigger consistently pulls old data instead of the latest updates from the data source.
root_cause: The calendar trigger may not be fetching new data due to the way it handles test events. When using the 'Fetch test event' option, it retrieves previously fetched data instead of the latest updates.
fix_steps: Update the calendar with new data
Switch to the execution tab in n8n
Wait for at least one minute for the new data to appear
agent_instruction: Activate the workflow, update the calendar, and check the execution tab for new data.
